description: Timeline for a market shift: canonical structural driver, rationale, when it first surfaced, and major developments.

canonicalDriver.description: One-sentence structural cause: Actor/Event → Constraint/Bottleneck → Primary Market Channel.

canonicalDriverRationale.description: 1–3 sentences explaining why this canonical driver was selected and what evidence supports it.

firstSurfacedAt.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this narrative first appeared in financial news.

majorDevelopments.description: Chronological list of major developments with dates and article refs.

date.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD for this development.

description.description: One sentence description of the development.
